verdict.note: fresh adopter via real CLI: init writes .pi/extensions/spexcode.ts (dispatch stamp, all 6 handlers) + skills, exclude hides all .pi/**, trust.json gains exactly the mainCheckout entry (user's 'false' preserved); uninstall removes extension+skills+trust+the whole .pi tree, zero residue

pi Stop-gate rejection silently dropped: stop-gate blocks via decision:block JSON on dispatch stdout (exit 2, stderr empty); generated extension reads only stderr in agent_settled+tool_call, so nothing is injected and the session hangs active forever (same signature as victim 34c53e6d)
fixed: extension parses stdout decision:block JSON (stderr fallback) in tool_call + agent_settled; fresh pi worker flows active→asking ~10s after settle, gate text injected intact

matrix row 1 re-run: fresh pi worker settles undeclared -> gate teach text injected as user message (visible in pane) -> agent declares done --propose close -> working->close-pending in ~13s; rejection never dropped
idle send: exit 0, exactly one injected user turn; mid-turn send lands as steer into the LIVE turn (reply 'done-A pong-B' merges both), each marker exactly once in scrollback
stop keeps worktree, resume relaunches via 'pi --approve --session <id>' (launch.sh), online in ~3s; MEMCHECK probe answered 'done-A pong-B' from pre-stop turns — same conversation
SIGKILL pi TUI -> offline in <=1s even with the stale rvSock FILE still on disk (connect probe, not file presence); resume -> online in ~2s
edit tool genuinely blocked (forbidden.txt unchanged); handler's own reason BLOCK-REASON-4242 visible in pane and quoted verbatim by the agent; session continued to a clean asking declaration
pi agent ran 'spex session ask --note <q>' -> record flips to asking, note carried verbatim to session ls/board; CLI acked the recording in-pane

dirty-tree merge proposal rejected at settle with the file named (scratch2.txt) and the ritual explained, reason injected into the pi session; committed tree + same proposal passes to review/merge. Gate is stop-time (CLI records declarations unconditionally) — per stop-gate design
close x2: tmux window, pi process tree, worktree+branch, rendezvous socket, and global session record all gone — zero residue on every axis

post shim-runtime refactor retest: real dispatched pi worker (pi 0.80.10) settled undeclared; the gate's stdout decision:block reason re-entered as an injected user message (readable teaching text, real newlines, no wire JSON), the agent declared done --propose close, record flowed working→close-pending. PreToolUse spec-first injection also observed through the shared runtime.

post shim-runtime refactor retest: idle send exit 0, injected exactly once (PINEAPPLE answered and routed back); mid-turn send while pane showed a live turn — exit 0, injected exactly once, agent reacted in the same turn (MANGO). Multi-connection server: board probes never kicked a delivery.
